text_anchor: Looking at the book collection, I cannot clearly see the book covers because a dark tint is permanently applied over every single book image in the grid, making it nearly impossible to visually browse and identify books by their visual appearance and cover design.
positive_node: <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 transition-colors duration-300 flex items-end justify-center pb-4 opacity-100">

text_anchor: When I search for books and see the dropdown suggestions, half of each suggestion text is missing off the right edge of the dropdown menu, cutting off crucial information and forcing me to navigate based only on partial and incomplete search result titles.
positive_node: <div className="absolute z-50 mt-1 w-1/2 bg-white shadow-xl max-h-96 rounded-lg py-1 text-base ring-1 ring-black ring-opacity-5 overflow-auto focus:outline-none sm:text-sm left-0">
